narrative:
Crestline Ex Vill Sd (Crawford) exempted village school district has 3,232 registered voters, with 60.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a modest Republican lean of 5.0 percentage points.
